TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-rain-kaniw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: a i sumamad kami u Sakizaya hananay a tamdaw i ayaw nu enem a bataan a mihcaan kya saka pala lid ku demiad makelal.
S.PHON: a i sumamad kami u sakizaja ħananaj a tamdaw i ajaw nu ənəm a bataan a miħʦaan kja saka par~ɾa r~ɾid ku dəmiad makər~ɾar~ɾ.
S.FORM: a i sumamad kami u Sakizaya hananay a tamdaw i ayaw nu enem a bataan a mihcaan kya saka pala lid ku demiad makelal.
S.PHON: a i sumamad kami u sakizaja ħananaj a tamdaw i ajaw nu ənəm a bataan a miħʦaan kja saka par~ɾa r~ɾid ku dəmiad makər~ɾar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 大約六十年之前,撒奇萊雅人經歷了一場好幾天的旱災.
About sixty years ago, Sakizaya people had a drought for several days.

S.FORM: saka nipalumaan satu kalitang a nu u kubkub a hican aca nan tu haw sa makelal cay kakapah.
S.PHON: saka nipar~ɾumaan satu kar~ɾitaŋ a nu u kubkub a ħiʦan aʦa nan tu ħaw sa makər~ɾar~ɾ ʦaj kakapaħ.
S.FORM: saka nipalumaan satu kalitang a nu u kubkub a hican aca nan tu haw sa makelal cay kakapah.
S.PHON: saka nipar~ɾumaan satu kar~ɾitaŋ a nu u kubkub a ħiʦan aʦa nan tu ħaw sa makər~ɾar~ɾ ʦaj kakapaħ.
S.TRANSL: 所種植的花生或玉米因為旱災而不好.
The peanuts or maize were poor in quality due to the drought.

S.FORM: inay haw ku nilangecan.
S.PHON: inaj ħaw ku nir~ɾaŋəʦan.
S.FORM: inay haw ku nilangecan.
S.PHON: inaj ħaw ku nir~ɾaŋəʦan.
S.TRANSL: 沒有可以收成的.
There was nothing for harvest.

S.FORM: inay haw ku nikalitangan.
S.PHON: inaj ħaw ku nikar~ɾitaŋan.
S.FORM: inay haw ku nikalitangan.
S.PHON: inaj ħaw ku nikar~ɾitaŋan.
S.TRANSL: 沒有花生可以收成.
There was no peanut for harvest.

S.FORM: saka mahiza ku nikauzip saka maba des ku nika uzip nu binawlan saka.
S.PHON: saka maħiza ku nikauzip saka maba dəs ku nika uzip nu binawr~ɾan saka.
S.FORM: saka mahiza ku nikauzip saka maba des ku nika uzip nu binawlan saka.
S.PHON: saka maħiza ku nikauzip saka maba dəs ku nika uzip nu binawr~ɾan saka.
S.TRANSL: 所以,如此的生活對大家而言很辛苦.
Therefore, life in this way was difficult to the public.

S.FORM: mizatengtu ku babalaki.
S.PHON: mizatəŋtu ku babar~ɾaki.
S.FORM: mizatengtu ku babalaki.
S.PHON: mizatəŋtu ku babar~ɾaki.
S.TRANSL: 老人想.
The senior citizens thought.

S.FORM: ca'ay kakapah anu hini han ta ku nika uzip nu mita sa ku babalaki saka.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj kakapaħ anu ħini ħan ta ku nika uzip nu mita sa ku babar~ɾaki saka.
S.FORM: ca'ay kakapah anu hini han ta ku nika uzip nu mita sa ku babalaki saka.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj kakapaħ anu ħini ħan ta ku nika uzip nu mita sa ku babar~ɾaki saka.
S.TRANSL: 老人家說我們的生活不行如此這樣下去.
The senior citizens said that we could not lead a life as such.

S.FORM: i tawya henay maliyuh amin tuyni u di'tu tini i yessama sananay a di'tu saka.
S.PHON: i tawja ħənaj mar~ɾijuħ amin tujni u diʔ~ʡtu tini i jəssama sananaj a diʔ~ʡtu saka.
S.FORM: i tawya henay maliyuh amin tuyni u di'tu tini i yessama sananay a di'tu saka.
S.PHON: i tawja ħənaj mar~ɾijuħ amin tujni u diʔ~ʡtu tini i jəssama sananaj a diʔ~ʡtu saka.
S.TRANSL: 那時候大家都不知道耶穌這樣的神.
At that time everyone did not know God.

S.FORM: u babala ki a di'tu ku nisabalucu'an haw nu babalaki a misaudad kita sa kuheni.
S.PHON: u babar~ɾa ki a diʔ~ʡtu ku nisabar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡan ħaw nu babar~ɾaki a misaudad kita sa kuħəni.
S.FORM: u babala ki a di'tu ku nisabalucu'an haw nu babalaki a misaudad kita sa kuheni.
S.PHON: u babar~ɾa ki a diʔ~ʡtu ku nisabar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡan ħaw nu babar~ɾaki a misaudad kita sa kuħəni.
S.TRANSL: 老人家說老人家決定用他們的信仰來求雨.
The senior citizens said that they decided to pray for rain according to their religion.

S.FORM: saka malingatutu.
S.PHON: saka mar~ɾiŋatutu.
S.FORM: saka malingatutu.
S.PHON: saka mar~ɾiŋatutu.
S.TRANSL: 就開始了.
Then it began.

S.FORM: a misimsim malingatutu haw a.
S.PHON: a misimsim mar~ɾiŋatutu ħaw a.
S.FORM: a misimsim malingatutu haw a.
S.PHON: a misimsim mar~ɾiŋatutu ħaw a.
S.TRANSL: 開始想了.
began to think.

S.FORM: masauputu labila abi kuyni u babalaki nu Sakizaya tini i Maibul.
S.PHON: masauputu r~ɾabir~ɾa abi kujni u babar~ɾaki nu sakizaja tini i maibur~ɾ.
S.FORM: masauputu labila abi kuyni u babalaki nu Sakizaya tini i Maibul.
S.PHON: masauputu r~ɾabir~ɾa abi kujni u babar~ɾaki nu sakizaja tini i maibur~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 每天晚上馬立雲的老人都會集合.
Every night the senior citizens of Maibul gathered.

S.FORM: katukuhantu nu demiad tatenga' izawtu ku kamu nu babalaki tu saka i tini i binawlan.
S.PHON: katukuħantu nu dəmiad tatəŋaʔ~ʡ izawtu ku kamu nu babar~ɾaki tu saka i tini i binawr~ɾan.
S.FORM: katukuhantu nu demiad tatenga' izawtu ku kamu nu babalaki tu saka i tini i binawlan.
S.PHON: katukuħantu nu dəmiad tatəŋaʔ~ʡ izawtu ku kamu nu babar~ɾaki tu saka i tini i binawr~ɾan.
S.TRANSL: 到了那個時間,老人家就對部落的人說.
When the time came, the senior citizens told the tribe.

S.FORM: tya katukuh tya demiad u culentu mamin haw kuyni u talaayaway ku uzip haw u sEnEng.
S.PHON: tja katukuħ tja dəmiad u ʦur~ɾəntu mamin ħaw kujni u tar~ɾaajawaj ku uzip ħaw u sənəŋ.
S.FORM: tya katukuh tya demiad u culentu mamin haw kuyni u talaayaway ku uzip haw u sEnEng.
S.PHON: tja katukuħ tja dəmiad u ʦur~ɾəntu mamin ħaw kujni u tar~ɾaajawaj ku uzip ħaw u sənəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 日子到了,就分派年輕人到.

TRANSL.notes: When the day came, (they) allocated young people.

S.TRANSL: When the day came, allocated young people.

S.FORM: kya miletek amin kuheni tuyni u paza' tayni i buyu'.
S.PHON: kja mir~ɾətək amin kuħəni tujni u pazaʔ~ʡ tajni i bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: kya miletek amin kuheni tuyni u paza' tayni i buyu'.
S.PHON: kja mir~ɾətək amin kuħəni tujni u pazaʔ~ʡ tajni i bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 他們全部去山裡砍香蕉.
They went to mountain to chop banana trees.

S.FORM: cay kayadah ku niletekan.
S.PHON: ʦaj kajadaħ ku nir~ɾətəkan.
S.FORM: cay kayadah ku niletekan.
S.PHON: ʦaj kajadaħ ku nir~ɾətəkan.
S.TRANSL: 沒有砍很多 .
They did not chop many .

S.FORM: anu cacay a saupu anu enem a angangan anu pitu a angangan baluden.
S.PHON: anu ʦaʦaj a saupu anu ənəm a aŋaŋan anu pitu a aŋaŋan bar~ɾudən.
S.FORM: anu cacay a saupu anu enem a angangan anu pitu a angangan baluden.
S.PHON: anu ʦaʦaj a saupu anu ənəm a aŋaŋan anu pitu a aŋaŋan bar~ɾudən.
S.TRANSL: 如果有一堆,如果有六、七棵,再綁在一起.
If there is a bundle, if there were six or seven banana trees, tie them together.

S.FORM: kya pazengen i tini i nanum kapahay haw a sauwac.
S.PHON: kja pazəŋən i tini i nanum kapaħaj ħaw a sauwaʦ.
S.FORM: kya pazengen i tini i nanum kapahay haw a sauwac.
S.PHON: kja pazəŋən i tini i nanum kapaħaj ħaw a sauwaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 放到河水中.
Put them into water.

S.FORM: saka tusa haw a saupu ya malingatutu ku nika babalaki kya siepah izaw haw ku daedac izaw haw kuyni u kuyni u tunuc.
S.PHON: saka tusa ħaw a saupu ja mar~ɾiŋatutu ku nika babar~ɾaki kja siəpaħ izaw ħaw ku daədaʦ izaw ħaw kujni u kujni u tunuʦ.
S.FORM: saka tusa haw a saupu ya malingatutu ku nika babalaki kya siepah izaw haw ku daedac izaw haw kuyni u kuyni u tunuc.
S.PHON: saka tusa ħaw a saupu ja mar~ɾiŋatutu ku nika babar~ɾaki kja siəpaħ izaw ħaw ku daədaʦ izaw ħaw kujni u kujni u tunuʦ.
S.TRANSL: 老人家準備酒、檳榔及麻糬.
The senior citizens prepared wine, betel nuts and rice cakes.

S.FORM: kya a mibetiktu kuheni.
S.PHON: kja a mibətiktu kuħəni.
S.FORM: kya a mibetiktu kuheni.
S.PHON: kja a mibətiktu kuħəni.
S.TRANSL: 他們再灑水.
They sprinkled.

S.FORM: misasuwaltu i pabaway a di'tu.
S.PHON: misasuwar~ɾtu i pabawaj a diʔ~ʡtu.
S.FORM: misasuwaltu i pabaway a di'tu.
S.PHON: misasuwar~ɾtu i pabawaj a diʔ~ʡtu.
S.TRANSL: 跟祖靈講.
They prayed to ancestors.

S.FORM: ya mahamin kuheni a mibetik malingatutu kita saka mutizengtu amin kuheni i tini i angagnan nu paza' mueneng ku zuma.
S.PHON: ja maħamin kuħəni a mibətik mar~ɾiŋatutu kita saka mutizəŋtu amin kuħəni i tini i aŋagnan nu pazaʔ~ʡ muənəŋ ku zuma.
S.FORM: ya mahamin kuheni a mibetik malingatutu kita saka mutizengtu amin kuheni i tini i angagnan nu paza' mueneng ku zuma.
S.PHON: ja maħamin kuħəni a mibətik mar~ɾiŋatutu kita saka mutizəŋtu amin kuħəni i tini i aŋagnan nu pazaʔ~ʡ muənəŋ ku zuma.
S.TRANSL: 他們都站到香蕉樹上,其他也有人坐著.
They stood on the banana trees and other sat on them.

S.FORM: kya a malingatutu ma min haw ku binawlan.
S.PHON: kja a mar~ɾiŋatutu ma min ħaw ku binawr~ɾan.
S.FORM: kya a malingatutu ma min haw ku binawlan.
S.PHON: kja a mar~ɾiŋatutu ma min ħaw ku binawr~ɾan.
S.TRANSL: 大家才要開始.
Everyone began

S.FORM: saka hiam a min haw kina lalemed satu mamin haw ku binawlan mamin halusEnEng anu wawa tu babalaki tatayna tu cebusen ma mintu lima ku sapi pitapesi' tuya angangan nu paza' atu ni babalaki.
S.PHON: saka ħiam a min ħaw kina r~ɾar~ɾəməd satu mamin ħaw ku binawr~ɾan mamin ħar~ɾusənəŋ anu wawa tu babar~ɾaki tatajna tu ʦəbusən ma mintu r~ɾima ku sapi pitapəsiʔ~ʡ tuja aŋaŋan nu pazaʔ~ʡ atu ni babar~ɾaki.
S.FORM: saka hiam a min haw kina lalemed satu mamin haw ku binawlan mamin halusEnEng anu wawa tu babalaki tatayna tu cebusen ma mintu lima ku sapi pitapesi' tuya angangan nu paza' atu ni babalaki.
S.PHON: saka ħiam a min ħaw kina r~ɾar~ɾəməd satu mamin ħaw ku binawr~ɾan mamin ħar~ɾusənəŋ anu wawa tu babar~ɾaki tatajna tu ʦəbusən ma mintu r~ɾima ku sapi pitapəsiʔ~ʡ tuja aŋaŋan nu pazaʔ~ʡ atu ni babar~ɾaki.
S.TRANSL: 所有人,包含年輕人、小孩、老人跟婦女都把水倒在香蕉樹與老人身上.
Everyone, inclusive of young people, children, elder people and female, poured water on banana trees and old people.

S.FORM: a made nes a mihiya micebus tini i tuheniyan.
S.PHON: a madə nəs a miħija miʦəbus tini i tuħənijan.
S.FORM: a made nes a mihiya micebus tini i tuheniyan.
S.PHON: a madə nəs a miħija miʦəbus tini i tuħənijan.
S.TRANSL: 他們潑水要弄很久.
It took a long time to sprinkle.

S.FORM: saka malalemedtu amin ku nikauzip.
S.PHON: saka mar~ɾar~ɾəmədtu amin ku nikauzip.
S.FORM: saka malalemedtu amin ku nikauzip.
S.PHON: saka mar~ɾar~ɾəmədtu amin ku nikauzip.
S.TRANSL: 身體都濕了.
It was all wet.

S.FORM: tabaki mamin haw ku nikaungiyah sa.
S.PHON: tabaki mamin ħaw ku nikauŋijaħ sa.
S.FORM: tabaki mamin haw ku nikaungiyah sa.
S.PHON: tabaki mamin ħaw ku nikauŋijaħ sa.
S.TRANSL: 聲音很大.
The sound was loud.

S.FORM: malihawtu ku nika u zuma.
S.PHON: mar~ɾiħawtu ku nika u zuma.
S.FORM: malihawtu ku nika u zuma.
S.PHON: mar~ɾiħawtu ku nika u zuma.
S.TRANSL: 有人聲音啞了.
Someone's voice was coarse.

S.FORM: saka tya limu lak sa ku balucu' haw pilunguc haw tuyni u pauzipay a di'tu saka.
S.PHON: saka tja r~ɾimu r~ɾak sa ku bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ ħaw pir~ɾuŋuʦ ħaw tujni u pauzipaj a diʔ~ʡtu saka.
S.FORM: saka tya limu lak sa ku balucu' haw pilunguc haw tuyni u pauzipay a di'tu saka.
S.PHON: saka tja r~ɾimu r~ɾak sa ku bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ ħaw pir~ɾuŋuʦ ħaw tujni u pauzipaj a diʔ~ʡtu saka.
S.TRANSL: 心裡很高興向神祈求.
It was happy to pray to God.

S.FORM: namahizatu tya pahanhantu tya pahanhantu taluma'tu i tini i niyazu'.
S.PHON: namaħizatu tja paħanħantu tja paħanħantu tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡtu i tini i nijazuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: namahizatu tya pahanhantu tya pahanhantu taluma'tu i tini i niyazu'.
S.PHON: namaħizatu tja paħanħantu tja paħanħantu tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡtu i tini i nijazuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣停止了,就回部落了.
Then it stopped in this way and went back to the tribe.

S.FORM: tya masaupu aca kuyni u babalaki tya a mukan tu epah.
S.PHON: tja masaupu aʦa kujni u babar~ɾaki tja a mukan tu əpaħ.
S.FORM: tya masaupu aca kuyni u babalaki tya a mukan tu epah.
S.PHON: tja masaupu aʦa kujni u babar~ɾaki tja a mukan tu əpaħ.
S.TRANSL: 老人家又集合了,喝酒了.
The senior citizens gathered, too, and they drank wine.

S.FORM: tya patakid mamin ku sEnEng.
S.PHON: tja patakid mamin ku sənəŋ.
S.FORM: tya patakid mamin ku sEnEng.
S.PHON: tja patakid mamin ku sənəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 年輕人向老人敬酒.
Young people drank a toast to the senior citizens.

S.FORM: kya a masasuwasuwal aca.
S.PHON: kja a masasuwasuwar~ɾ aʦa.
S.FORM: kya a masasuwasuwal aca.
S.PHON: kja a masasuwasuwar~ɾ aʦa.
S.TRANSL: 又開始討論.
They discussed again.

S.FORM: haw u kawaw nu mita i mahini haw kanca haw u sakaka pah haw nu niyazu' u nikauzip nu mita.
S.PHON: ħaw u kawaw nu mita i maħini ħaw kanʦa ħaw u sakaka paħ ħaw nu nijazuʔ~ʡ u nikauzip nu mita.
S.FORM: haw u kawaw nu mita i mahini haw kanca haw u sakaka pah haw nu niyazu' u nikauzip nu mita.
S.PHON: ħaw u kawaw nu mita i maħini ħaw kanʦa ħaw u sakaka paħ ħaw nu nijazuʔ~ʡ u nikauzip nu mita.
S.TRANSL: 一定要讓部落更好,讓生活更好.

TRANSL.notes: (They) made the tribe better and made a better life.

S.TRANSL: made the tribe better and made a better life.

S.FORM: satu ku nikalimulak amin haw nu binawlan.
S.PHON: satu ku nikar~ɾimur~ɾak amin ħaw nu binawr~ɾan.
S.FORM: satu ku nikalimulak amin haw nu binawlan.
S.PHON: satu ku nikar~ɾimur~ɾak amin ħaw nu binawr~ɾan.
S.TRANSL: 每個人都快樂.
Everyone was happy.

S.FORM: tya salabi sa amin haw i tini haw i pakayingan masaupu.
S.PHON: tja sar~ɾabi sa amin ħaw i tini ħaw i pakajiŋan masaupu.
S.FORM: tya salabi sa amin haw i tini haw i pakayingan masaupu.
S.PHON: tja sar~ɾabi sa amin ħaw i tini ħaw i pakajiŋan masaupu.
S.TRANSL: 一整晚都在聚會所.
They stayed in the meeting place all night long.

S.FORM: ku nika u kawaw aca nu sakizayatu saka i tini i pilunguctu saka si u dadaw.
S.PHON: ku nika u kawaw aʦa nu sakizajatu saka i tini i pir~ɾuŋuʦtu saka si u dadaw.
S.FORM: ku nika u kawaw aca nu sakizayatu saka i tini i pilunguctu saka si u dadaw.
S.PHON: ku nika u kawaw aʦa nu sakizajatu saka i tini i pir~ɾuŋuʦtu saka si u dadaw.
S.TRANSL: 這也是撒奇萊雅族人祈雨的事.
This is about praying for rain in Sakizaya.

S.FORM: nasakaka pah nu mimihcaan tya izaw haw ku nilangecan haw nuni u binaulan.
S.PHON: nasakaka paħ nu mimiħʦaan tja izaw ħaw ku nir~ɾaŋəʦan ħaw nuni u binaur~ɾan.
S.FORM: nasakaka pah nu mimihcaan tya izaw haw ku nilangecan haw nuni u binaulan.
S.PHON: nasakaka paħ nu mimiħʦaan tja izaw ħaw ku nir~ɾaŋəʦan ħaw nuni u binaur~ɾan.
S.TRANSL: 大家年年豐收.
There is good harvest for everyone every year.

S.FORM: saka i tini kamu nu aku.
S.PHON: saka i tini kamu nu aku.
S.FORM: saka i tini kamu nu aku.
S.PHON: saka i tini kamu nu aku.
S.TRANSL: 我的話到此為止.
My speech ends here.
